_schema.live: deployed, public — renders 'Live site →' button pointing to live_url
_schema.preview: portfolio piece on derrickteo.com — renders 'Preview on derrickteo.com →' button pointing to preview_url
_schema.wip: internal / private / unfinished — renders a '🚧 Work in progress' badge, no clickable link
_schema.source_of_truth: Classifications synced to https://derrickteo.com Live / Preview / WIP sections

examples.name: 🧩 DT Site Creator
examples.why_it_matches: The methodology archive you're looking at right now — 5 archetype prompts + 11 mechanic snippets + 40+ pitfalls. Dogfooded: this site uses multi-page-scaffold, favicon, OG thumbnail from its own library. Developer tool · AI.
